author: Mato (LightSpeedUp)
name: PROTEUS EMA — Notable Non-Record
blurb: Baseline architecture + EMA weight averaging. 26 lines added, zero architectural changes. EMA smooths weight distributions, reducing INT8 quantization loss from 0.0072 to 0.0048 BPB. Includes documented negative results: INT4 catastrophic failure, depth recurrence boundary. Built with PROTEUS by LightSpeedUp — lightspeedup.com
